1: # Walkthrough - Puja Page & Shop Products Fix
2: 
3: I resolved all issues regarding product/puja data queries, navigation, and page load UI transitions:
4: 1. Fixed the main Puja screen in the tab bar (`puja.tsx`) to show actual general pujas (`general_poojas` table) instead of store items.
5: 2. Restored the "My Shop Product" screen (`all_pujas.tsx`) to show the correct store items/products (`website_pooja_products` table) rather than general pujas.
6: 3. Created a new, dedicated screen `all_general_pujas.tsx` to list all general pujas from the `general_poojas` table.
7: 4. Redirected the "View All Pujas" button on the Puja page (`puja.tsx`) to navigate to `/all_general_pujas` instead of the store products page.
8: 5. Resolved the shop products page (`all_pujas.tsx`) loading flash:
9:    - Added an `isLoading` state coupled with an `ActivityIndicator` loading spinner. This prevents the screen from rendering the mock `PUJAS_DATA` (e.g. Ganesh/Laxmi Puja) while the database query is fetching store products.
10:    - Updated the default value of the `viewAllSettings.title` state in `all_pujas.tsx` to `'Store'` to prevent it from flashing `'pujas'` in the header before settings load.
11: 
12: ## Changes Made
13: 
14: ### Mobile App Screens
15: 
16: #### [puja.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/(tabs)/puja.tsx)
17: - Redirected `loadGeneralPoojas` database fetch to query the `general_poojas` table.
18: - Subscribed `generalSubscription` to realtime database events on `general_poojas`.
19: - Modified "View All Pujas" button to navigate to `/all_general_pujas` instead of `/all_pujas`.
20: 
21: #### [all_general_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_general_pujas.tsx) [NEW]
22: - Created this screen to display all general pujas, querying `general_poojas` and filtering them by categories (`'Wealth'`, `'Peace'`, `'Mahadev'`, `'Protection'`, `'Auspicious'`).
23: 
24: #### [all_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_pujas.tsx)
25: - Restored this page querying the `website_pooja_products` table.
26: - Added `ActivityIndicator` and `isLoading` spinner view when data is fetching.
27: - Defaulted the initial screen title to `'Store'` to prevent title flashes.
28: 
29: #### [puja_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/puja_detail.tsx)
30: - Added `general_poojas` to the fallback list under `loadPujaDetails` so it can resolve and render details for both general pujas and store products.
31: 
32: #### [settings_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/settings_detail.tsx)
33: - Modified `fetchTempleCatalog` to fetch from both tables (`general_poojas` and `website_pooja_products`) to map item IDs to their corresponding temple names properly.
34: 
35: ## Verification
36:
